description: Multimodal skill config — model defaults for Gemini, Imagen, Veo, MiniMax.

optional.name: human-mcp
optional.purpose: In-loop multimodal analysis and generation — image/video analysis, Gemini image gen, video gen. Complements the t1k:extended-multimodal skill for interactive (non-batch) use. Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY env var.
optional.installCmd: claude mcp add human-mcp -- npx -y github:The1Studio/human-mcp#v2.15.1
